\tzpentry{ID5940}{Text Field Strength Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5940 introduces Text Field Strength Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[\n\\mathcal{F}_{\\text{eff}}\n= \\mathcal{F}_{\\text{GL}}\n+ g \\sum_{n,m} A_{n,m} |\\Psi|^2 J_m(k_{n,m} r).\n\\]
